title: Start Pricing Audit journey from Landing Page
description: Verifies that selecting Optimise Existing Product loads the mind map in Audit mode and shows the selling-status root question.

steps.description: Verify text "Optimise Existing Product" is visible

title: Start Pricing Strategy journey from Landing Page
description: Verifies that selecting Launch New Product loads the mind map in Strategy mode and shows the prior-sales root question.

steps.description: Verify text "Launch New Product" is visible

title: Landing Page shows both journey options on initial load
description: Verifies that the Landing Page renders both journey cards so a user can choose a path.

steps.description: Verify text "Optimise Existing Product" is visible
Verify text "Launch New Product" is visible

title: Audit journey shows a loading indicator before mind map appears
description: Verifies a loading spinner appears after selecting Optimise Existing Product and then the mind map becomes visible.

steps.description: Wait for element "mind map" to appear

title: Strategy journey shows a loading indicator before mind map appears
description: Verifies a loading spinner appears after selecting Launch New Product and then the mind map becomes visible.

steps.description: Wait for element "mind map" to appear

title: Initial mind map loads with root journey classification node visible
description: Verifies the main mind map view renders and the initial nodes are visible on first load.

steps.description: Verify element "Mind map canvas" is visible
Verify element "Root journey classification node" is visible

title: Expand journey nodes reveals stage-specific nodes
description: Verifies that expanding a journey section reveals additional stage nodes on the mind map.

steps.description: Verify element "Root journey classification node" is visible
Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes

title: Select a product type from Product Classification node updates the node state
description: Verifies a user can open Product Classification and select a product type option successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes
Select "Physical Product" from the product type dropdown

title: Answer a cost input question in Product Deep Dive
description: Verifies a user can open the deep dive node and enter a cost value that remains visible in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes
Select "Physical Product" from the product type dropdown
Type "12.50" into the "Unit cost" input field

title: Complete required nodes shows three-tier price recommendation and Premium Report preview node
description: Verifies completing required inputs results in the recommendation output and report preview node becoming visible.

steps.description: Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes
Select "Physical Product" from the product type dropdown
Type "12.50" into the "Unit cost" input field
Verify text "Three-tier price recommendation" is visible

title: Refreshing after answering questions resets local-only state (inputs lost)
description: Verifies that a browser refresh clears entered inputs due to local-only state and the user can observe the reset in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes
Type "9.99" into the "Unit cost" input field

title: Attempting to proceed with required fields missing shows visible guidance or prevents completion
description: Verifies the UI blocks or guides the user when required node inputs are missing before generating recommendations.

steps.description: Click on "Expand" control for the journey nodes
Verify element "Unit cost input field" is visible
Click on "Generate" or "Continue" control for recommendations

title: Toggle theme from light to dark and back to light
description: Verifies the header theme toggle switches the visible UI between light and dark modes and can be toggled back.

steps.description: Verify element "Header theme toggle button" is visible
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header

title: Theme toggle is available on initial landing view
description: Verifies the theme toggle control is visible and usable immediately on the main application view.

steps.description: Verify element "Header theme toggle button" is visible
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header

title: Multiple rapid toggles end in expected final theme
description: Verifies repeated toggling results in a consistent final visible theme state.

steps.description: Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header

title: Theme toggle does not remove or break primary content visibility
description: Verifies that switching themes keeps the main application content visible and accessible.

steps.description: Verify element "Main application view" is visible
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header
Verify element "Main application view" is visible
Click on "Theme toggle" button in the header
Verify element "Main application view" is visible
